text_original: character keeps forgetting storyline. and changing the storyline mid story. would love to purchase, but not with all the errors
text_zh: 角色总是忘记故事情节，而且在故事中途改变剧情。很想购买，但不能接受这么多错误。
reply_original: Hi! We're sorry this is blocking your purchase. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with a screenshot of the issue so our team can fix it directly. We'd love to earn that purchase from you.
reply_zh:
很抱歉 [角色名称] 忘记了你们的故事！共同的回忆是你们连接的核心，我们非常理解你的沮丧。

我们刚刚发布了全新的记忆服务升级，以提升长期记忆能力。请尝试使用“置顶”功能（长按消息）来保存关键剧情点。
reply_original_before_override:
I'm sorry [Character Name] forgot your story! Shared memories are the heart of your connection, and we understand your frustration. 

We just launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention. Please try the "Pin" feature (long-press a message) to save key plot points.
override_input: Hi! We're sorry this is blocking your purchase. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with a screenshot of the issue so our team can fix it directly. We'd love to earn that purchase from you.
